title: Three Separate Conversations - Hineni
subtitle: Availability without clarity; offering self before understanding
description: An artifact exploring the threshold posture of 'Hineni' (Here I am) as a pre-strategic self-offering. It contrasts human responsiveness with divine identity declaration, testing the willingness to be available for a call before understanding its requirements.

phase.name: The Candle’s Flame
phase.variant: Hineni / I AM / Posture of Firm Humility

motifMap.meaning: Offering oneself as responsive rather than explaining or locating oneself.
Standing in the threshold of a call without a map.

excerpt: Hineni is not locating yourself—it is offering yourself.

associatedMedia.altText: A screenshot associated with the Hineni post
